zh-CN.name: 数字10
zh-CN.intro: 十是一个两位数，比九多一。我们有十根手指和十根脚趾，可以帮我们数到十。十是个完美的数字！

story.title: 🐻十个手指头
story.body: 宝宝伸出两只小手，数一数：一、二、三、四、五、六、七、八、九、十！十个手指头，排成两排。左手有五个，右手有五个。它们可以一起做好多事情：拍拍手，啪啪啪；捏泥人，揉一揉；数豆子，一颗一颗。十个手指像十个好朋友，天天陪着你玩。每次数到十，就数完了手手上的所有手指，真开心！

knowledge.title: 为什么我们有十个手指？
knowledge.body: 我们人类有十个手指，是因为这样能很方便地抓东西和做细活。十也成了我们最喜欢的计数单位，比如十个苹果就是一篮。

en.name: Ten
en.intro: Ten is a two-digit number, one more than nine. We have ten fingers and ten toes, which can help us count to ten. Ten is a perfect number!

story.title: 🐻Ten Little Fingers
story.body: Spread out your two little hands and count: one, two, three, four, five, six, seven, eight, nine, ten! Ten fingers standing in two rows. The left hand has five, the right hand has five. Together, they can do many things: clap hands, pat-a-cake; squish clay, roll it round; count beans, one by one. Ten fingers are like ten good friends, with you every day. Whenever you count to ten, you finish counting all your fingers. How happy!

knowledge.title: Why do we have ten fingers?
knowledge.body: Humans have ten fingers because it makes it easy to grab things and do fine work. Ten has also become our favorite counting unit—like a basket of ten apples.
